prompt: Create a tall vertical Korean manhwa / moe fantasy illustration of a mysterious young woman standing in front of a glass window or translucent panels overlooking a calm ocean at sunset. The composition is a close full-body portrait cropped tightly, with the woman centered and facing forward, her face mostly in shadow and expression unreadable. She has long windblown dark hair with pale silver-gray ends, blunt bangs covering her eyes, soft pale skin, and a slender elegant figure. Her body is stylized like living rose-themed glass or shadow: glossy translucent skin, dark botanical silhouettes across her torso and legs, scattered petal reflections, and a strapless dark green moss-like rose bodice made of organic foliage. Add dramatic rim lighting from the right side, with a bright sun flare near her chest and shoulder, cool blue shadows, and pink-orange sunset highlights. Surround her with exactly 9 visible red roses: 1 large partial rose at the upper left corner with leaves, 1 upright rose near the upper right beside her head, 1 large rose at lower center-left in front of her hip, 1 rose bud/half-open rose at lower center-right, 1 full rose at lower right-center, 1 small rose near the lower right, 1 large partial rose cropped at the bottom left corner, 1 pale cream rose cropped at the far lower right edge, and 1 small rosebud on the right edge near the horizon. Include floating red petals and tiny glowing specks around her, plus vertical glass-panel seams and reflections. Background: distant cliffs and islands on the left, turquoise-blue sea, pastel sky at dawn or dusk, soft atmospheric haze. Use highly polished anime concept art, Korean webtoon beauty, semi-realistic lighting, delicate linework, glossy reflections, rich crimson roses, cinematic backlight, dreamy romantic mood, no text, no watermark. Character customization: unnamed rose spirit, black fading to silver-gray, dark green moss-like rose foliage, red roses, ocean sunset seen through glass panels.
